entry.title: CDS View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA.
entry.content:
CDS based View used in End routine is not working when performing delta operation to DTP in BW4HANA. FULL Mode of DTP is working fine. Unable to find the issue.

Here is the CDS Code,

AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZMM_DBV_XXXX'
AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
EndUserText.label: 'Effectiveness'
VDM.viewType: #BASIC

define view ZPM_CDS_BA_XXXXXXX as select   from XXXXXX as _a {
    _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim,
    sum (1)  as Cnt

} where _a.signedon <> '00000000'
group by
   _a./bic/zcpermit,
    _a./bic/zcshftdt,
    _a./bic/zcshfstim

entry.title: Re: LSMW Config. (for Beginners) - SAP HCM
entry.content: Thanks, Jagadeesh.

entry.title: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
In this case, on the page for the SAP Business One tag, I see two entries:

The first does not appear to have any connection to SAP Business One.

The second is an answer to a question tagged with SAP Business One. However, there are many many more and newer similar replies that are not shown here.

Is this a bug, is this element under contruction or what is the logic here?

entry.title: Re: View more than 20 packages in a maintenance strategy...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can display only 20 Packages.

To see more, select the line and click Maintenance Package, you can see the package. Also, you can click Allocate Maint Package and choose the package

Regards

Terence

entry.title: SAP Enable Now - Is there an automated data retention feature for maintaining content?
entry.content: Content has been created in our workareas. Is there an automated policy where we get notified that the content needs to be reviewed as it has been x amount of months/years since it was created?

entry.title: Report is loading message on SAP B1 web client
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am trying to preview the layout from SAP B1 web client but i can see the message that report is loading but report is not opening or previewing. I waited for almost more that 1 hr but status remain same and even error is also not coming.

I am using SAP B1 v 10 SP 2311 on HANA

 

 

Regards,

Tushar

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Groovy script logic for CompanyCode lookup
entry.content: Update - This is Resolved via Groovy.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (French/English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found with our full schedule here (Authentication Required)

Please join us for our Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.


Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

entry.title: 4 big waves for API led strategies and SAP BTP Integration Suite explosive growth
entry.content:
Why should I care about APIs at all?

API led strategies and SAP BTP Integration Suite adoption in the coming few years will be driven by a at least 4 big waves and in combination they might change the way how SAP customers look at this, often wrongly called “technical”, topic. This architect is intended mostly for SAP Enterprise and Integration Architects who might want to learn about the future trends of the SAP technology stack adoption but also to anyone who is familiar with SAP integration.

 

What are API led strategies and how does SAP BTP Integration Suite come into this picture?

API-led strategies refer to an approach to software development and integration where Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) are the central focus. APIs are designed first to create a layer of connectivity that enables different systems, applications, and data sources to communicate with each other. This way APIs become the building blocks that facilitate the exchange of data and the execution of processes across the enterprise and beyond.

“Integration is the backbone of digital transformations and APIs are the building blocks of every SAP customer who sells, buys or transports their products with its use" – Michal Krawczyk

SAP Business Technology Platform Integration Suite is a crucial element in API-led strategies for organizations that use SAP solutions. It provides a comprehensive set of integration services that help businesses connect SAP applications with other SAP and non-SAP applications, both in the cloud and on-premises. With the SAP BTP Integration Suite, companies can develop APIs that expose functionalities of their SAP systems, allowing for better agility in response to changing business needs, easier collaboration with partners, and maybe most important, ability to create innovative services.

 

Why do I need know/learn more about API led strategies and SAP Business Technology Platform Integration Suite?

There are at least 4 waves that will change the way you think about API led strategies and SAP Business Technology Platform Integration Suite adoption and let me know explain that in more details.

  • First wave – SAP PI/PO to SAP BTP Integration Suite migrations – according to SAP there are were over 10.000 SAP PI/PO customers that before 2027 need to plan to move away from SAP PI/PO due to the sunset of the onpremise platform. This means that the number of SAP BTP Integration Suite installations running the all existing integration scenarios will increase significantly
  • Second Wave – Clean Core Strategy concept might from the initial point of view have very little to do with the APIs and SAP BTP Integration Suite – it’s an idea to remove any kind of extensions from the core ERP (SAP S/4HANA) systems to keep the system clean. If you’re in the SAP space however you must understand that those extensions must be build somewhere… The concept of side by side extensions shows clearly that they will be build on the top of SAP BTP but where exactly? How can I access my Clean Core ERP system to build the extensions? There are two ways – you can either use directly exposed APIs from the SAP S/4HANA systems or you can orchestrate those integrations using SAP BTP Integration Suite
  • Third wave – Reliable Automation – discussions aboud the automation are quite often moving into the RPA only topics – how can we automate business processes using RPA technologies. Is that the only way to automate business processes? The most efficient, stable and reliable way to automate business processes has always been to integrate them using API techologies (using EDI in the past, REST, ODATA, Web Services right now). It seems we now get more and more proof that “iPaaS Emerges as the Dominant Platform for Automation and Integration”.
  • Forth wave AI – “There is no AI without API” How can generative AI help companies do execute different activities? It needs to understand the command/need and be able to relate that to an activity it can perform. How can SAP AI assistant (Joule) run any activity (report, create a new integration, etc.)? It needs to call an API which will do perform this activity. Does it mean I cannot use AI at my company without having the API led strategy and API enabled products? This answer I leave for the SAP Enterprise and Integrations Architect to decide.

Summary

This article is just a personal view highlighting the possible emerging trends which may cause the API and SAP BTP Integration Suite explosive growth and adoption. If you’d want to find our more I’d advise to find out how to test your API, Integration Platforms scenarios in the free openSAP course: “Avoid SAP S/4HANA Project Delays with Third-Party Systems Service Virtualization”

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud Field extensions
entry.content: @Vincent_Zhu How can I custom field can also be extend to the related OData/SOAP APIs for data integration purpose? I need to add several fields to Journal Post API?

entry.title: I need to expose an API that accepts a document number and physical file path.
entry.content:
I need to expose an API that accepts a document number and front-end file path ( on the user's PC).

Once it is triggered, it should read the content of file and transfer it to the ECC system along with the document number.

Please suggest how to achieve this.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Enter a valid purchase order item. 00010 is not valid. on S4Hana Cloud
entry.content: Hi Vikrant. Is the issue resolved?. If yes, Can you please let me know how it is resolved?

entry.title: Re: execute listing function from BAPI
entry.content: the Ideal FM to list with an Assortment is WRF_MAPINB_ASSORT_LISTING_RFC

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now shut down producer when editing recording
entry.content: Hey Shane, please find attached the error log file. I also had the issue with text bubbels in bookpages. This morning everything worked normal... strange...

entry.title: Re: Handling Unit Label Printing Through PPF in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Another option would be to use a start condition in the action definition that evaluates the associated delivery status.  It would return a value in ep_rc other than zero for any time the goods movement status is not shown as complete.  The trick here would be to associate the business object (HU) to the delivery with the information that is passed to the BADI.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: XPATH Expression to Count the Row nodes for XML ( Excel workbook format xml)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need some inputs in creating XPath expression to count row nodes. I know we can use count() function, however its not giving desired results.

Input is XML payload mentioned below or here.

Xpath I'm using is -     count(/ss:Workbook/ss:Worksheet[@ss:Name='Credit Cards']/ss:Table/ss:Row)

Namespace declared -  xmlns:ss="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet"

When I tested the same XML and XPath expression on http://xpather.com/ it gave Expected results ( RowCount = 2)

 

However, in CPI the result is RowCount = 0 

Can anyone please guide what is missing here ?

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Input XML :

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Workbook xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office" xmlns:x="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:excel" xmlns:ss="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:spreadsheet" xmlns:html="http://www.w3.org/TR/REC-html40" xmlns:dt="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:datatypes">
<DocumentProperties xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office">
<Author>AB</Author>
<LastAuthor/>
<Created>2006-03-17T14:40:25Z</Created>
<LastSaved>2019-01-03T16:09:17Z</LastSaved>
<Company>END USER</Company>
<Version>16.00</Version>
</DocumentProperties>
<OfficeDocumentSettings xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office">
<AllowPNG/>
</OfficeDocumentSettings>
<ExcelWorkbook xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:excel">
<WindowHeight>8190</WindowHeight>
<WindowWidth>20430</WindowWidth>
<WindowTopX>0</WindowTopX>
<WindowTopY>0</WindowTopY>
<TabRatio>493</TabRatio>
<ProtectStructure>False</ProtectStructure>
<ProtectWindows>False</ProtectWindows>
</ExcelWorkbook>
<Styles>
<Style ss:ID="Default" ss:Name="Normal">
<Alignment ss:Vertical="Bottom"/>
<Borders/>
<Font ss:FontName="Arial" x:Family="Swiss"/>
<Interior/>
<NumberFormat/>
<Protection/>
</Style>
<Style ss:ID="s62">
<Borders/>
<Font ss:FontName="Verdana" x:Family="Swiss"/>
<Interior/>
<NumberFormat ss:Format="@"/>
</Style>
<Style ss:ID="s63">
<Alignment ss:Horizontal="Center" ss:Vertical="Bottom"/>
<Borders/>
<Font ss:FontName="Verdana" x:Family="Swiss"/>
<Interior/>
<NumberFormat ss:Format="@"/>
</Style>
</Styles>
<Worksheet ss:Name="Credit Cards">
<Table ss:ExpandedColumnCount="24" ss:ExpandedRowCount="2" x:FullColumns="1" x:FullRows="1" ss:StyleID="s62" ss:DefaultRowHeight="12.5625">
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="51"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="81.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="61.5"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="116.25"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="92.25"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="84"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="36.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="24.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="118.5"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="84"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="44.25"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="63.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="67.5"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="78.75" ss:Span="1"/>
<Column ss:Index="16" ss:StyleID="s62" ss:AutoFitWidth="0" ss:Width="66.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="57.75"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="68.25" ss:Span="1"/>
<Column ss:Index="20" ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="60"/>
<Column ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="65.25" ss:Span="1"/>
<Column ss:Index="23" ss:StyleID="s62" ss:Width="42"/>
<Row ss:AutoFitHeight="0" ss:StyleID="s63">
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Login ID</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Display Name</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Card Type</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Credit Card Number</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Expiration Date</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Name on Card</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Street</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">City</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">State/Province/Region</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Zip/Postal Code</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Country</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Air Default</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Car Default</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Hotel Default</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Rail Default</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Taxi Default</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Allow Air</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Allow Car</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Allow Hotel</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Allow Rail</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Allow Limo</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Gov Card Type</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Status</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Error</Data>
</Cell>
</Row>
<Row ss:AutoFitHeight="0" ss:StyleID="s63">
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">A000EmployeeID_0@google</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Corporate Amex</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">AX</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">CardmemberAcctNo0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">ExpireDate_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">FullName_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">Address_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">City_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">StateProvince_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">PostalCode_0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">US</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>

<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>

<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">0</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String">
0
</Data>
</Cell>
<Cell>
<Data ss:Type="String"/>
</Cell>
</Row>
</Table>
<WorksheetOptions xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:excel">
<Unsynced/>
<Print>
<ValidPrinterInfo/>
<HorizontalResolution>600</HorizontalResolution>
<VerticalResolution>600</VerticalResolution>
</Print>
<FreezePanes/>
<FrozenNoSplit/>
<SplitHorizontal>1</SplitHorizontal>
<TopRowBottomPane>1</TopRowBottomPane>
<ActivePane>2</ActivePane>
<Panes>
<Pane>
<Number>3</Number>
</Pane>
<Pane>
<Number>2</Number>
<ActiveRow>0</ActiveRow>
</Pane>
</Panes>
<ProtectObjects>False</ProtectObjects>
<ProtectScenarios>False</ProtectScenarios>
</WorksheetOptions>
</Worksheet>
</Workbook>

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

for some reason, not able to attach the file.

Thanks,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
Here is my submission:

{
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "type": "com.sonal.plm.NPDI.Created.v1",
  "source": "https://plm-prod.sonal.com/npdis",
  "subject": "NPDI000000001",
  "id": "196179a2-6cf1-4166-9975-51f9afdb3a0d",
  "time": "2024-03-06 12:00:00",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": { 
    "id": "NPDI000000001",
    "description": "New Product Development and Introduction Created"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports in ubuntu?
entry.content: Does this prior post help? https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/installation-of-sap-crystal-reports-on-a-linux-server/qaq-p/12717501

entry.title: Crystal reports in ubuntu?
entry.content: I have some invoices made in crystal reports, I want to know if in the ubuntu computer that I have I can install something of crystal reports or some other application to be able to visualize in a web application the .rpt that are generated, my project is made in php.

entry.title: Re: H4S4 Vs SAP HCM Compatibility packs - High-level overview
entry.content:
Thank you for the content!

I would be interested if someone already has answers for previous questions? Will it be relevant to activate H4S4 anyway even if only SAP S/4HANA "HR mini-master " is in use?

There is at least a note about basic HR mini-master infotypes that can be used w/o licensed HCM (would be the case for customers who run HR outside core S4 ERP) but will using those require the H4S4 activation anyway? Also wondering what is the case with custom info types.. are those still working like before. 

What happens to HR mini-master w/o HCM activation e.g in S/4 2023 version?

entry.title: Re: SAP. You have so many English people working for you. Why must you make such a basic error?
entry.content: don't know about anyone else but i understand what 'until' means, so maybe just a 'warning'?

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP Functionality for EDI Processing: Material Determination for Inbound Orders
entry.content:
Hello @M_Kalyabin , 

Appreciate the above post. It explains clearly and in depth the determination of Material Number while processing Incoming EDI Order. 

Thanks. I will wait for another blog on Unit of Measure. 

Regards, 

Jignesh.

entry.title: DBA Cockpit Webdynpro not displaying graphical explain
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am currently trying to analyse expensive sql statements in the DBACOCKPIT but when trying to use the Webdynpro DBACOCKPIT Explain, the screen stays empty:

I activated all SICF Nodes in according to this node:

1245200 - DBA: ICF Service Activation for WebDynpro DBA Cockpit 

I also regenerated the views via the transaction SGEN. Ran all the connection test without any issues.

I checked ST22 and SU53 but see no dumps or authorization errors.

In another thread it was mention that the hostname could be an issue but this is working fine. The only thing I saw was that I receive an error in the web browser console for a dependency not being found, but checking SICF I couldn't find any missing nodes.

Does anyone has a clue or did I miss anything for the configuration?

Thanks for your effort and time.

BR,

Andreas

entry.title: Refreshing queries daily through Scripting
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have created a script to run a query within SAP, but the script does not work until I go through the action itself. When I try to run the script without going through the action it gets stuck after loading into the SQ00, it's not able to select the query with the variant, it always returns "The control could not be found by ID".  I believe this has to do with refreshing the query, but I could not find a solution to refresh the query in these forums for my situation. 

My action is SQ00--ZINV_SCHD_CC_1 (query name)-- ZBER_CC_1 (variant)

This is the code that I am running, this is pulled straight from the script record within SAP. 

If Not IsObject(application) Then
Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
WScript.ConnectObject application, "on"
End If
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlIMAGE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell").doubleClickNode "F00073"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[17]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]").sendVKey 4
session.findById("wnd[2]/usr/cntlALV_CONTAINER_1/shellcont/shell").currentCellColumn = "TEXT"
session.findById("wnd[2]/usr/cntlALV_CONTAINER_1/shellcont/shell").selectedRows = "0"
session.findById("wnd[2]/usr/cntlALV_CONTAINER_1/shellcont/shell").doubleClickCurrentCell
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlCONTAINER/shellcont/shell").pressToolbarContextButton "&MB_EXPORT"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlCONTAINER/shellcont/shell").selectContextMenuItem "&XXL"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "Tag Download"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").caretPosition = 12
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlCONTAINER/shellcont/shell").setCurrentCell 7,"LGTYP"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlCONTAINER/shellcont/shell").selectedRows = "7"

 

So ideally I would like to come in each day run the script and have it refresh the query, run the query, then export to excel under the name "Tag Download"

If there is a post that has the solution to this please link it here.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

Thanks for this wonderful opportunity.

I have completed certification course and already sent a mail for voucher.

I am applicable in the "People looking to switch their careers mid-life" category.

Thanks,

Ashwini Mane.

entry.title: SAC Cross-Model Parameter for Date
entry.content:
Does anyone know how to utilize Cross-Model Parameter for Date dimension?

It seems it is not working, since Date is a private dimension in each model

I have a scenario where we input data in multiple planning models (due to very different data structure I decided not to build all in a single model). After data input we need to reload data to "central model" with dedicated master data for consolidated reporting. And Date is a DA parameter of course, as this shouldn't be done for all the timeline each time. And I have to create a separate parameter for each model in my MultiAction for Date dimension. From the end-user perspective this results into terrible pop-up window with all the parameters to fill.

I had to build ZDATE public dimension with type Generic to be able to use it in cross-model parameter, but this approach has a lot of other difficulties and constraints.

Anyone have better ideas?

entry.title: Re: ODATA calls - SAP Background process
entry.content:
API calls will use online background process. If there is any submit statement in the api code then it will consume additional background process.

Thanks

Govind

entry.title: Re: ADT installation error - Eclipse 2023-12
entry.content:
Hi all,

Thank you very much for your replies. The issue was with my corporate laptop and network. Cloud connector was used to install ADT. Closing this thread.

Regards,

KP

entry.title: QR code on sales billing document
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

Can SAP S/4HANA Cloud generate a payment QR code for sales invoice? QR code that would be printed on the PDF invoice form and can be used for the reimbursement of the billing document?

Thank you very much in advance for any feedback.

Klara

entry.title: Re: Error code: ERR_EMPTY_RESPONSE - SAP HANA
entry.content: This link is not accessible anymore.

entry.title: Re: SAC Cross-Model Parameter for Date
entry.content: For now, -until SAP improves- I use several data (or mutlti) actions per model and trigger them consecutively myself using scripting. At least that allows using same parameters/prompts to the user.

entry.title: Re: XPATH Expression to Count the Row nodes for XML ( Exc...
entry.content:
Remove the double quotes in your namespace declaration in the integration flow, and then your XPath should work.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: SAC Cross-Model Parameter for Date
entry.content: Hi Jef, this sounds good. Could you please share some code extract for running MultiActions with a prompt populated?

entry.title: Re: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CD...
entry.content:
I have tried implementing using Virtual elements, but is it was not useful as I cannot consume the output using Data Preview & to consume it.

I created OData service as well to view Text, but still was not helpful.

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFlow PostExit
entry.content: This was also possible in PI/PO systems, but you would generally see it when a particular source or shared source fields could be used to map to multiple target fields, and especially so when the complexity of graphical mapping logic is high and could be used in more than one target mapping.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: add icon in List Report Table (not criticality icons)
entry.content: Did you solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content: How can it be achieved? Have you tried to do this in CPI?

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports in ubuntu?
entry.content: This is definitely not the correct group to ask that question in.  This group is for discussions around CodeJam events and their content.

entry.title: Re: XPATH Expression to Count the Row nodes for XML ( Exc...
entry.content:
Hello Akshay,

Can you use below expression in CPI and try once 

count(/*:Workbook/*:Worksheet[@*:Name='Credit Cards']/*:Table/*:Row)

I hope it works 🙂

Regards,

Carol Pereira

entry.title: Re: Avoiding Timing Out in Webi
entry.content: Request to have the Web Intelligence Rich Client installed on your workstation. No timeouts.

entry.title: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
Hello. I have repeating containers with a background image.
The images are obtained from an API and in each container, they are taken from different URLs.

In the preview application, the images are not taken correctly and the same image is always repeated.

I thought it was a bug in the preview app, but it happens also in the compiled version of Android (I haven't tried it on IOS yet).

The bug is several months old and is really serious, since it does not allow a functional update to be generated.

This screen captures shows the problem.

Working well (previous version)

Version with the bug:

The app ID is 49364

SAP team, can you please review it?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: VA02 from an ABAP program
entry.content: Both are possible but BAPI would generally be considered the preferred approach. There may be rare occasions where BDC ends up being a more suitable choice but not likely with sales order change.

entry.title: Re: Self-registration with SAP Cloud Platform Identity Authentication Service
entry.content:
hi, great blog!

Is there also standard functionality to allow end users to delete or deactivate their own accounts? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content: I haven't tried it in CPI, but I don't see why it wouldn't be possible since it was always possible in the PI/PO platforms.

entry.title: Data Table - invalid Unique Id [66000-138] while inspecting CFL SelectedObjects
entry.content:
After migrating customer's servers from SAP9.3 PL12 to SAP 10 2402 (through 2208) our addon started giving back an exception when accessing any property of SelectedObjects from ChooseFromListEvent

 

System.Runtime.InteropServices.COMException (0xFFFFE1B3): Data Table - invalid Unique Id  [66000-138]
   bei SAPbouiCOM.DataTableClass.get_IsEmpty()

 

on line where I use cflEvent.SelectedObjects.IsEmpty, like in code sample:

 

public bool ProcessItemEvent(string FormUID, ref SAPbouiCOM.ItemEvent pVal)
{
	if (pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_CHOOSE_FROM_LIST && !pVal.BeforeAction && pVal.ActionSuccess && pVal.ItemUID == "edBP") {
		var oForm = GetForm(FormUID);

		SAPbouiCOM.ChooseFromListEvent cflEvent = pVal as SAPbouiCOM.ChooseFromListEvent;
		SAPbouiCOM.Grid grid = SAPUtils.GetControl<SAPbouiCOM.Grid>(oForm, "gRLZ");
			

		if (!cflEvent.SelectedObjects.IsEmpty)
		{
			SetCardName(oForm, cflEvent.SelectedObjects.GetValue("CardName", 0).ToString());

 

 

 Dear experts, any ideas what should I do with this? It looks like a bug.

entry.title: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS
entry.content:
Hello,

e.g. I have PO for 100 EUR, and invoice for 80EUR. Invoice is smaller than PO so Invoice has posted- but I don't want it. I have some materials, which shouldn't have price deviations PO/INVOICE (so i have to control it, and I don't want auto postings) and some materials, which could have it. How I can set that for some material price deviations couldn't be accepted and invoices don't  auto post?

Thanks!

#accounting #POdeviations #PO #POandInvoicedeviations #pricedeviation

entry.title: Re: The new Simplify withholding tax on IRRF table - Country: Brazil
entry.content:
Bom dia Luís,

Como estou começando do SAP, vi que esta nota 3415449 é para o modulo de Seguros, e não aplica na parte financeira. Nós temos muitos  prestadores  Autônomos.  Atuamos em  233 municípios de Goiás e precisávamos de que o   IRRF  na Contabilidade Financeira  fizesse o calculo automático do Desconto Simplificado ou Completo como foi implementado para o Seguro, no momento temos que escolher qual imposto vai incidir e isto esta gerando alguns problemas.

  •

IshtiaqAlam

provide HTTP Proxy to True.

entry.title: Re: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFl...
entry.content: That is what I am struggling with actually

entry.title: SAP ICC @SAP Partner Summits for SME 2024 in Singapore, Madrid & Pheonix !!
entry.content:
SAP Partner Summits for SME are back again in 2024 in 3 beautiful cities !! Singapore, Madrid and Phoenix !! Check out the link for more info and do register !!
Register today at 👉 https://sap.to/6059pow1Z
🌏 Singapore: March 12 - 13, 2024
🌎 Phoenix (AZ): April 10 - 12, 2024
🌍 Madrid: April 23 - 25, 2024

These events not only serve as a platform for our partners to directly hear from SAP experts but also serve as a great networking opportunity where our partners often connect with other partners for collaborative ideas ! What more, this year we are super excited to have our partners explore innovation and certification opportunities with “SAP Integration and Certification Center” #SAPICC.

SME events in 2024 will focus on taking SAP Business One into a Cloud future and keep addressing the lower mid-market and small businesses. We will also talk about additional capabilities of #SAPBTP to be developed side-by-side. You will also hear us focusing on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as the Cloud ERP for every business need addressing the large enterprise as well as the upper mid-market segment (GROW with SAP).

In line with SAPs strategy, SAP Integration and Certification Center (SAP ICC) will certify the partner products which fit into the scenarios of GROW, BTP and B1.

Certify your SAP Business One Solution : 

You can gain greater visibility over your Small & midsize business with SAP Business One certification. In today’s market many SAP partners who resell SAP Business One distinguish themselves from their competition by providing their own add- ons, integrations and packaged IP together with SAP Business One. SAP Channel Partners can develop SAP Business One add-on on for both SAP Business One and SAP Business One version for SAP HANA. If interested to certify with us, order through Partner Benefit Catalog.

Certify Your Industry Cloud Solution (GROW logo) :
Partner solutions that have been approved under the Industry Cloud Solution Readiness Check (ICRC) to meet all industry cloud solution criteria according to the Architecture & Development Guide for Industry Cloud Solutions can earn an additional stamp of approval from SAP by certifying their BTP-based extensions for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition with SAP ICC. Promoting your app as “SAP Certified – Integration with GROW with SAP” allows you to showcase both your expertise as well as your own IP and enables you to get ready to win the market with SAP Business Technology Platform. If interested, order through PBC.

Certify your Apps and Extensions on SAP BTP :
Promote your app as “SAP Certified – Built on SAP Business Technology Platform”. The SAP ecosystem thrives through partners offering applications and IP integrated with the SAP solution portfolio and built on SAP Business Technology Platform. To strengthen the joint go-to-market opportunity for partner IP alongside SAP BTP, you are invited to certify your SAP BTP extensions, apps, integration and analytics content with the SAP Integration and Certification Center.If interested, order through PBC.

KEY BENEFITS OF SAP ICC CERTIFICATION :
1. Trust & Credibility: Achieving Certification is a powerful testament to a partner's commitment to quality and technical excellence. It instils trust in customers assuring them that the certified solution is technically integrated SAP Business one add-on.
2. Market Visibility: SAP Store is a globally recognized marketplace for SAP solutions. With a certified solution, partners gain increased visibility, attracting potential customers looking for reliable and integrated Industry Cloud applications.
3. Competitive Advantage: Certification sets partners apart in a competitive market. It demonstrates a deep understanding of SAP technologies and a dedication to delivering exceptional solutions.
4. SAP Certified logo will prove high standard of software and technical integration of your solution with SAP solutions.

Many of our partners are already enjoying the benefits of certification being their customers GOTO certified products. Have a look at the Certified Solutions Directory to find out which B1 partners are already certified with us. Certified BTP partner solutions can be accessed through this link. Also, you can check certified GROW partners here. We look forward to discuss and explore innovation and certification opportunities with you. We welcome our partners to join us in our next generation partnering journey !!

Check out for the all-day long sponsored pods (POD Name: Partner Innovation Lifecycle Services) at your respective events in Singapore, Madrid and Phoenix. Our colleagues mentioned below will be happy to assist you !
 Felipe Grandi : Pheonix event
 Rustem Rymkulov : Madrid event
 Swetha Biradar : Singapore event

Looking forward for not ONE but THREE fabulous events filled with learning, fun and networking !!

entry.title: Re: Error when closing production order due to inspection...

Hi

Probably not recommended, but perhaps an alternative to (2): use STATUS_CHANGE_INTERN to deactivate status I0203 (SPRQ Quantity posting required). Don't forget COMMIT WORK. Thereafter you can 'Cancel lot' in QA02.

entry.title: getting error while deploying the SAP CAPM service in cf env. "Some instance has crashed"
entry.content:
Hi folks,

While consuming external API service in our SAP CAP project we are getting error in deployment that "Some instance has crashed". It is showing in logs the below error, but this error is not able to conclude the exact reason. Please help if anyone has clue about this issue. 

instance: cf289ff5-ff7e-4428-6bc1-d71c, index: 0, cell_id: 38614a92-7668-48b9-b60e-50fda881d051, exit_description: APP/PROC/WEB: Exited with status 1, reason: CRASHED

just to inform that we have enough space in disk to run and deploy the application and use at least one auth in package.json. And currently we have updated the node.js version to 20.0.0,but the issue still persists. 

Any clue about the issue will be great help to us. Thanks !

You can use the standard report H99UDDED.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Tables TCURM and T001W inconsistent; notify your syst...
entry.content: Tables TCURM and T001W inconsistent; notify your systems administrator

entry.title: Re: SAP ECC to SAP BW data transfer
entry.content:
Hi

 

The idocs are just containing the administrative information about the requests, but not the actual data (at least not in case of transactional data, master data attributes and texts). In SAPI the data is processed in LUW-s from the tRFC queue (SM58).

See:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_740/2e90b26cf7484203a523bf0f4b1bc137/4058bf803ec3da48802e8fa76a47a0e9.html?locale=en-US

Also:

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-members/idoc-communication-between-bi-and-ecc-during-extraction/ba-p/12991850

 

But the above applies only if you are transferring the data via SAPI to BW via Infopackage. In case you are using ODP, there are no idocs, no tRFC queue. The whole processing is handled by the ODP framework.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: Journal Entry - Change (Asynchronous) to update CD amount
entry.content: Hi sangwan, reading the help: "Cash Discount Amount in Document Currency Definition Cash discount amount in document currency. Use For open items, this amount is the cash discount agreed upon (assuming a fixed amount was agreed upon and not a percentage rate). For cleared items, the amount shows the cash discount that was actually taken. Procedure During document entry, you only need enter the cash discount amount if this amount is fixed rather than a percentage rate. This amount is no longer changed by the system." This make me belive that Change operation should not include this field, and it should only be in the Post Operation.https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/b978f98fc5884ff2aeb10c8fdeb8a43b/22a267e571e948499fda007a65b27c64.html?q=CD%20Amount

entry.content:

{

  "specversion": "1.0",

  "id": "6145bd0e-9b19-1edd-a18c-2966eaf68c13",
  "time": "2024-03-06T16:35:49Z",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
    "Product": "TEST MATERIALS"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: Converting fixed length file to xml using groovy scri...
entry.content: Update: This is resolved using groovy script to convert the fixed length file into XML payload and then used XSLT mapping to group the records based on specific fields.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10 Upgrade stuck
entry.content: The upgrade has finally finish... 7 days laters. From my reading, "lsass.exe" are related to the Active Directory, our test server didn't have access to the active directory, this probably cause the trouble.

entry.title: Passing bw variable value in SAC for passing hierarchy not possible?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have this use case and am not finding a soulution. I am using optimized story.

I have a bw variable with a hierarchy on 0ORGUNIT. I want to jump from this to another story and give the variable value as parameter, which works fine. But I can not change the Hierarchy of my variable filter. So for example the initial hierarhy is hier_1 and the user wants to change to hier_2 it is not possible.

I could make another variable which contols what hierarchy is used and also have a filter for that, or change it whith coding, but how can i pass the information what node is selected and on what hierarchy to pass it to the second story?

Did anybody also have this problem and found a workaround or solution?

Cheers

Nico

entry.title: Debug Tips for program RFFOEDI1
entry.content:
RFFOEDI1 is the program of 'International Payment Medium - Payment Orders by EDI', which can be used to generate checks from F110 through IDOC with the message type PAYEXT for payment or DIRDEB for direct debit.

If someone needs to manipulate any field values for the generated IDOC, may need to deeply investigate its include program RFFORI14. This article just lists some tips that may help to familiarize with this IDOC processing during debugging.

 

1. Function modules initial with 'FI_EDI_PAYEXT_PEXR2001'

There are 3 major function modules used for IDoc processing inside RFFORI14:

  • 'FI_EDI_PAYEXT_PEXR2001_NEW' will do the initialization per bank for payment instructions, and populate the IDoc header segments from table REGUH (Settlement data from the payment program).
  • 'FI_EDI_PAYEXT_PEXR2001_OUT' will populate the IDoc item segments from table REGUP (Processed items from payment program) and send payment instructions out by calling 'MASTER_IDOC_DISTRIBUTE'.
  • 'FI_EDI_PAYEXT_PEXR2001_END' will deal with the final work when sending payment instructions and provide a final chance to manipulate values through 3 user exits at include program LIEDPF0J.

 

2, Populating IDOC item segments

To determine whether the payment is for Payment with the message type PAYEXT or Direct Debit with the message type DIRDEB, which relies on the Indicator of 'Payment Method Used for Incoming Payments.

It comes from table T042Z-XEINZ at the level of Country Key combined with Payment Method.

Take the processing for payment as an example, the routine 'ITEM_PAYEXT' will perform the item segment filling. 

Then just check which segment you are interested in:

 

FORM ITEM_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_IDPU1     USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_IDPU5_SG  USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_EDP03     USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_EDP02     USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_IDPU2     USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
  PERFORM FILL_SEGMENT_IDPU3_SG  USING IDOC_PAYEXT.
ENDFORM.                               "ITEM_PAYEXT

 

There are 3 user exits available here inside routine 'STORE_PEXR_SEGMENT':

 

3. Reset after IDOC has been generated

It's precious to have a perfect test case, and you may need to verify new changes back and forth. So just learn how to reset the IDOC and make it ready for the next execution.

entry.title: Converting SOAP API to REST API FOR POST METHOD
entry.content:
we have soap API in se37 FM - Z_VENDOR_GETDETAILS convert to REST API by Using ODATA.

Advantages :

Using REST endpoints offers simplicity and security.It simplifies API requests, making them quick and easy to manage.
Additionally, security benefits can be achieved through role access functions, allowing control over user access to specific services.

SE37 - SOAP API

Code snippet for SOAP API :

 

 

 

 

IF ip_lifnr IS NOT INITIAL AND ip_ebeln IS INITIAL.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input  = ip_lifnr
      IMPORTING
        output = ip_lifnr.

    SELECT * FROM ekko INTO TABLE et_po_hdr WHERE lifnr = ip_lifnr.
    IF et_po_hdr[] IS INITIAL.
      ep_msg = 'No purchase order found'.
    ENDIF.
  ELSEIF ip_lifnr IS NOT INITIAL AND ip_ebeln IS NOT INITIAL.
    SELECT *  FROM ekpo INTO  table et_po_item WHERE ebeln = ip_ebeln.
    IF et_po_item[] IS INITIAL.
      ep_msg  = 'No purchase order found'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

 

 

 

 

 

 We have to import SOAP API by using RFC/BOR interface in SEGW 

Once you defined the all entity types make sure that artifacts must be generated.

Once  your entities methods are getting generated based on your entities inside DPC_EXT Class so just provide the implementation /IWBEP/IF_MGW_APPL_SRV_RUNTIME~CREATE_DEEP_ENTITY (redefine) method to perform the operation.

We have to call our main entity set and call our own method to read the data.

Code snippet for create_deep_entity method.

 

 

 

 

METHOD /iwbep/if_mgw_appl_srv_runtime~create_deep_entity.
 CLEAR er_deep_entity.
    CASE iv_entity_set_name.
      WHEN'VendorSet'.
        er_deep_entity = _vendorgetdetails( io_data_provider ).
    ENDCASE.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

Create own method to perform the operation.

import and export parameters of _vendordetails method

 

To Define the structures and navigation names and calling soap API inside the method _vendorgetdetails 

 

 

 

 

METHOD _vendorgetdetails.

**-- Data Declaration
    DATA : BEGIN OF ls_entity.
             INCLUDE TYPE zcl_zvendor_getdetail_mpc_ext=>ts_vendor.
    DATA :   vendorHeader TYPE zcl_zvendor_getdetail_mpc=>tt_vendorheader,
             vendorItem   TYPE zcl_zvendor_getdetail_mpc=>tt_vendoritem.
    DATA : END OF ls_entity,
    lo_message_container TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_message_container.

**--constants
    CONSTANTS: lc_type   TYPE bapi_mtype VALUE 'E',
               lc_id     TYPE symsgid VALUE '01',
               lc_number TYPE symsgno VALUE '02'.

**--intialize
    io_data_provider->read_entry_data(
      IMPORTING
        es_data = ls_entity
    ).

**--Raising exception
    IF ls_entity-ip_lifnr IS INITIAL.
      lo_message_container = me->mo_context->get_message_container( ).
      DATA(ls_return) = VALUE bapiret2( type = lc_id
                                        number = lc_number
                                        message = TEXT-010 ).

      lo_message_container->add_message(
        EXPORTING
          iv_msg_type               =   ls_return-type               " Message Type
          iv_msg_id                 =   ls_return-id               " Message Class
          iv_msg_number             =    ls_return-number              " Message Number
          iv_msg_text               =     ls_return-message             " Message Text
      ).

      RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception
        EXPORTING
          message_container = lo_message_container.
    ENDIF.

**--Calling existing RFC

    CALL FUNCTION 'ZVENDOR_GETDETAIL'
      EXPORTING
        ip_lifnr   = ls_entity-ip_lifnr
        ip_ebeln   = ls_entity-ip_ebeln
      IMPORTING
        ep_msg     = ls_entity-ep_msg
        et_po_hdr  = ls_entity-vendorheader
        et_po_item = ls_entity-vendoritem.

    copy_data_to_ref(
      EXPORTING
        is_data = ls_entity
      CHANGING
        cr_data = rx_deep_entity
    ).

  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

 

Once you done with your implementation just maintain and activate your service in Gateway Builder.


Click on Register Button it will open new session there provide your package and click on Continue to activate the service.

Once your service Registered successfully select your service and click on SAP Gateway Client.

 

After Execute you will get vendor header and vendor item details in http response.

 

Conclusion:

this requirement basically helps in converting SOAP API to REST API to improving performance and web service based also we can use.


Hope I find it will we be helpful. If any queries please welcome on comment sections.

Regards,
Vishnu Teja.

entry.title: For GRDC dimensions - use of Flexible upload in Data monitor
entry.content:
Hi Experts  

We have GRDC system with custom fields defined. And we have GRDC forms designed to load data (manual filling). However, for data migration activity, Business need to fill 40 Forms for multiple periods. As its major time taking. We are exploring flexible upload from data monitor.  

Query: these GRDC fields are not defined in Breakdown category of FS items. would system allows the data load to GRDC fields from flexi upload functionality. 

Additional points: We are able to load data for GRDC fields from GRDC forms without any issue. and we are using statistical accounts in GRDC forms. 

Thank you.

entry.title: machine manufactured the relevant material
entry.content:
Hi experts!

How can I determine which machine manufactured the relevant material based on the material document?

Is there any relevant table for this issue,

entry.title: Re: Odata GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET( ) returns empty structure
entry.content:
Hi,

What i am seeing is that upon debugging, the er_entityset(in CALL METHOD me-> /iwbep/if_mgw_conv_srv_runtime~copy_data_to_ref)  is accepting only 1 internal table at a time.

Am i doing something wrong in declaration of the main nested table(it_bphdr) ?

When i pass single itab's it the output is coming good but the GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET( ) has to be called multiple times.

entry.title: how to create synchronous iflow from sap cpi
entry.content:
hi, I need to create a synchronous iflow cpi from sap via proxy.

Can anyone tell me how I can make the call synchronous? On the XI receiver channel I don't see the possibility to select "best effort"

entry.title: Re: Access data from SAP Datasphere in Snowflake
entry.content:
Great blog. Thanks for sharing.
Very helpful as more and more customers have hybrid worlds. Using multiple technologies.

entry.title: Re: Configure Inspection points SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello Darko,

I don't know if you found an answer to your problem, but in my case, I activated the API https://api.sap.com/api/USAGEDECISIONSELDCODESET_0001/overview.
You can use the inspection points in SAP DM with Process order and Production order as mentionned in this link https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/using-inspection-points-9af42cb5d6c2467183213c13076c02a6.

The requirement is to use Production POD to get access to the inspection point.

Feel free to give feedback in case you need any further information,
Regards,
Badreddine

entry.title: Re: How to mass update Material Classification in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, for those who got the error "no process template for goal basic mass update and otc 194 does exist", at this blog you can find the solution:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-mdgm-how-to-create-process-template-for-multiple-processing-in-s-4-hana/ba-p/13449451

Cheers

entry.title: Re: Do we have any certification courses for SAP generati...
entry.content: Hi, we do not. Recommend you the generic openSAP course to GenAI - see https://open.sap.com/courses/genai1

entry.title: Re: how to create synchronous iflow from sap cpi
entry.content:
You can find the choice between "Exactly Once" and "Best Effort" on the delivery assurance tab.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Attribute not displayed in OCC response.
entry.content:
Faced Similar Kind of Issue for the below property

<property name="dAddressCountry" type="String"/>
<property name="dAddressState" type="String"/>
<property name="dAddressCity" type="String"/>
<property name="dAddressLine1" type="String"/>
<property name="dAddressZipCode" type="String"/>

 

Seems to be these datMapper Classes is not able  to identified the fields starting with one small case letter.


working fine after when i defined

<property name="deliveryCountry" type="String"/>
<property name="deliveryState" type="String"/>
<property name="deliveryCity" type="String"/>
<property name="deliveryAddress" type="String"/>
<property name="deliveryZipCode" type="String"/>

entry.title: How to make Mandatory a Field
entry.content:
Hello everyone , 

i want to make a field Mandatory .

How can i do this ?

entry.title: Thoughts on Improvements to Fiori Apps Reference Library
entry.content:
The information that the Fiori Apps Library provides is impressive. SAP has packed an impressive set of  instructions for implementation, configuration, role assignment and catalog structure into each of the apps described in Fiori Apps Library.

But the search capabilities is limited, inadequate and awkward at best. Here are a few pain points:

  1. First you're faced to select between some ambiguous choices: All Apps, Fiori Apps, BTP Apps, Lighthouse Apps,... For a business or functional user looking to see if there is an app that satisfies their business requirements, these choices are irrelevant and meaningless. Most of the time they want to search by keywords. Limiting the search right off the bat to a set of choices that most of the time do not makes sense to the user provides for an awkward and unpleasant experience.
  2. The next hurdle is when you finally do get to search, and try searching for a keyword, like Business Partners. You are now faced with a single-column list of 100's of results that is practically impossible to pick from. The results are not in a table format, with columns specifying catalogs, business roles, type of tiles, etc. so the user of the App Library can intelligently pick what they are looking for, instead of guessing and clicking on random apps to see more information about each, going back to the list and clicking on another one.
  3. Which brings up the next extremely annoying issue; your choice of SAP S/4/HANA version does not stick! Every time you look at another app, you need to remember to select your version again before looking at the details, otherwise it defaults back to the latest version. I cannot count the number of hours of wasted time this has caused our development team.

 

I think the amazing Fiori Element List-Report template would be a perfect choice for the Fiori Apps Library site. Present the user with a set of search options to allow categorized search capabilities, and display the results in a tabular format with columns that help the user sort, filter and find the app they are looking for. We have one of the best platforms for structured searching and reporting (Fiori Elements), it is a shame that the Fiori App Library still carries such an out-dated and awkward search capability for their bible of Fiori apps.

Something like this:

Again, I think the Fiori Apps Library represents an impressive source of well-categorized information and instructions about implementing Fiori apps. But the search capabilities is a weakness and in dire need of an update.

Interested in knowing if anyone else feels we are due for an update?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi @AndreF welcome to SAP Community. It's great you are now part of it. What is your main interest? Check out our interest groups to find the one which fit most! Don't forget to "join" so you don't miss any updates anymore.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello @Samudra warm welcome to SAP Community. 
If you haven't already, I would like to recommend to check the location group Kolkata . It's a great opportunity to connect with other local peers. Also, there are regular on-site events. Might be the best chance to actually meet other community members in person.

Check it out and don't forget to "join" the group.

entry.title: Re: No Create Subscription button in serverless function
entry.content: Me as well! Did somebody already have a solution?

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Awesome Work Nagesh!

entry.title: Re: Wrong image in repeated containers (SEVERAL BUG)
entry.content:
The same problem when using repeated image instead of repeated container background.

Checking the files API, and the solicited URL is correct.

Please. Is urgent !! 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Integration – Message Monitoring Automated Report
entry.content: when using the automated monitoring report to get"COMPLETED" flows, I'm getting mismatched values when comparing some of the report values and the actual values, this problem only occurs when the status= COMPLETED, the others are on point, any idea what may be the cause of this mismatch?

entry.title: Re: Default recipient of internal modular questionnaire
entry.content: Unfortunately, there is no such way with current functionality to add a default user / group as a recipient to internal modular questionnaire.

entry.title: Custom chart is not displaying data in SAP UI Integration chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to SAP build work zone advanced edition and UI integration card. I created UI integration card to displays data from the SAP gateway system, so I created destination and consumed that destination in manifest.json and define content as well. But when I preview UI integration card in BAS, it is not showing any data and I don't see any errors in the network tab. Below is the manifest.json code. Kindly help me if I missing anything.

{
    "_version": "1.14.0",
    "sap.app": {
        "id": "ns.uicard",
        "type": "card",
        "title": "Workflow History UI card",
        "subTitle": "",
        "applicationVersion": {
            "version": "1.0.0"
        }
    },
    "sap.ui": {
        "technology": "UI5",
        "deviceTypes": {"desktop": true, "phone": true, "tablet": true},
        "icons": {
            "icon": "sap-icon://list"
        }
    },
    "sap.card": {
        "type": "List",
         "configuration":{
                   "destinations":{
                      "FD1":{
                         "name": "Workflow_Dest",
                         "defaultUrl":"/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/"
                      }
                   }
         },
         "data":{
              "request":{
                "url":"{{destinations.FD1}}/sap/opu/odata/sap/Z04_SRV/ZUI5_COMMONSet",
                "withCredentials": "true"
              },
              "path":"/d/results"
         },
        "designtime":"dt/configuration",
        "header": {
            "title": "Workflow History",
            "subTitle": "All type of Workflow history",
            "icon": {
                "src": "sap-icon://desktop-mobile"
            }
        },
        "content": {
            "item":{
                "title": "{EmpName}",
                "description": "{WiText}"
            },
            "maxItems" : 5
    }
},
    "sap.platform.mobilecards": {
        "compatible": true
    }
}

Thanks & Regards,

Devi

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition  SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform , @ronaldlee @Divya_Tiwari

entry.title: Customização Formula de Imposto
entry.content:
Olá!

Estou passando por uma dificuldade no processo de cálculo de ICMS-ST na minha operação, veja se conseguem me auxiliar.

Trabalho em uma empresa onde somos substitutos tributários de ICMS-ST, logo o ICMS-ST é enquadrado como crédito no processo de aquisição de mercadorias, o que ocorre quando adquirimos mercadorias em que o imposto já foi pago.

Desta forma, quando o fornecedor nos efetua a venda, eles informam no XML o valor deste ICMS-ST pago, nas tags <vBCSTRet>, <vICMSSubstituto> e <vICMSSTRet>:

Com isso, preciso que o valor de 75,18 seja aplicado na fórmula de cálculo do ICMS-ST para creditar o valor na mercadoria. Portanto, quando efetuo a entrada da nota, esse valor será alocado em um campo personalizado, neste caso, U_vICMSSubstituto.

O problema é que não consigo utilizar este campo para calcular o imposto. Existe a possibilidade de utilizar um campo personalizado na fórmula de cálculo?

Basicamente, o valor do imposto deve ser igual ao campo customizado:

TaxAmt = U_vICMSSubstituto


Abraço a todos,

Diego Perilo Madeira
